plugins.name: agent-cowork
plugins.description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering three areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support); (3) agent context handoff brief generation — handoff (ephemeral brief Markdown for cross-agent or cross-teammate task transfer).

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack).

plugins.name: blueprints
plugins.description: Design-doc skills that support implementation: lean-prd (interview-based lightweight PRD), erd (Mermaid ERD at conceptual/logical/physical levels), domain-model (bounded context with Ubiquitous Language and invariants), policy-book (ADR-style business policy registry with POL-XXXX IDs). All skills use AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md to store per-project paths instead of separate config files, and share a no-prefix naming philosophy for ongoing-maintenance documents.
